---
format:
  html:
    theme: yeti
    page-layout: full

profile:
  name: Cristina Jackson
  image: ~/Desktop/ENVS-193DS/cristinajacks0n.github.io/IMG_6368.jpeg
  image-shape: rectangle
  image-width: 17em
  image-title: Cristina Jackson

  links:
  - icon: linkedin
    text: LinkedIn
    href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/cristina-jackson-244926211/
  - icon: envelope
    text: Email
    href: mailto:cjackson@ucsb.edu
---

Hi! I am Cristina Jackson, an undergraduate student at UC Santa Barbara studying Economics and Environmental Studies. I am from San Francisco and have so much love for my home, California. I love learning and have been really passionate about learning how to code and building this website! I love building and creating things—whether it’s a well-run event, a tight-knit team, or a killer spreadsheet and data plot! When not in school, you can find me running along the bluffs by Devereux Beach or sailing with my team in the Santa Barbara Harbor! I love the outdoors and have a great appreciation for nature and the world around me. I have coached at the Chautauqua sailing center for the past few summers and work at a doctors office in Santa Barbara. I have administration experience having worked at the St. Francis Yacht Club helping run races in the San Francisco Bay.

## Education
